policy.purpose: Daily earnings and event-risk overlay for advisory-only stock and option decisions.

option_policy.same_day_or_next_2_days: Block new option risk unless a separate earnings-volatility thesis is explicitly written and user-approved.
option_policy.within_7_days: Require manual review for calls, puts, covered calls, cash-secured puts, and spreads.
option_policy.post_earnings: Wait for the first post-earnings reaction to settle before adding directional option risk.

sources.notes: Public calendar endpoint. Availability can vary; keep reports resilient when blocked.

manual_events.notes: Seeded because local public calendar fetch was network-blocked; verify before staging options.
Seeded because local public calendar fetch was network-blocked; verify before staging options.

option_action_rules.call_action: Do not open new long calls or covered calls through the event; review closing or rolling short calls.
option_action_rules.put_action: Do not open new long puts or cash-secured puts through the event; review assignment and gap risk.
option_action_rules.spread_action: Only defined-risk paper trades with explicit max loss and post-earnings expiry should be considered.

option_action_rules.call_action: Reduce size or use spreads; avoid buying rich IV without a catalyst thesis.
option_action_rules.put_action: Use smaller defined-risk structures; avoid selling premium if assignment is not desired.
option_action_rules.spread_action: Prefer defined-risk spreads and expiry at least 30 days beyond earnings.
